note: Second run of 2026-07-19, 3.5h after the first. It tested the first run's hypothesis that the empty 07-18/07-19 was Exa index lag, and DISPROVED it: 07-17 was a Friday and five domains independently confirmed via live cache-busted listings that they published nothing at the weekend. These journals are weekday publishers. All 9 items staged were 07-17 search-recall misses from the day the first run had already swept — recovered entirely by front-page reconciliation, with Exa search contributing zero. Next run's window should be keyed on Monday 2026-07-20 output.
